$comment: Sahej death life-event knowledge base v0.1. Survivor support after a death in the family. Same schema as the childbirth KB: eligibility predicates over a profile, components with deadlines (days since the death), document dependencies, cash, provenance and confidence. Research-grade drafts; needs_verification rules must be confirmed against current Government Orders.

checkpoints.$comment: No fixed home-visit rail exists for deaths; these are sensible follow-up checkpoints (days after the death) the worker can schedule around.

schemes.name: Death Registration
schemes.authority: Registrar of Births & Deaths (statutory, RBD Act 1969)
schemes.apply_at: The hospital (if death occurred there) or the Gram Panchayat / municipal registrar

benefit_components.title: Register the death (free within 21 days)
benefit_components.title_hi: मृत्यु पंजीकरण (21 दिनों के भीतर नि:शुल्क)
documents: medical certificate of cause of death
benefit_components.note: GATEWAY DOCUMENT. Free within 21 days; late registration needs fees and a magistrate/registrar process. Every survivor benefit below requires the death certificate.

schemes.name: National Family Benefit Scheme
schemes.apply_at: Block Development Office / Tehsil social welfare desk

all.label: the deceased was the family's primary breadwinner

benefit_components.title: One-time family benefit (₹20,000)
benefit_components.note: Apply promptly — several states enforce an application window (often ~90 days, varies). Verify the local limit.

schemes.name: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension (IGNWPS)
schemes.authority: Ministry of Rural Development (NSAP, central) + state top-ups
schemes.apply_at: Block Development Office / Tehsil social welfare desk, or the Gram Panchayat secretary

all.label: applicant is the widow of the deceased
widow aged 40–79 (younger widows: check state schemes)
widow aged 40–79 (80+ moves to old-age pension)

benefit_components.title: Monthly widow pension (₹300 central + state top-up)
benefit_components.title_hi: मासिक विधवा पेंशन (₹300 केंद्रीय + राज्य अंश)
benefit_components.note: Central share is ₹300/month (₹500 at 80+); most states add a top-up — several pay ₹1,000+ total. Younger widows and non-BPL: check the state's own widow pension.

schemes.name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima (life insurance claim)
schemes.apply_at: The deceased's bank branch (where the ₹436/yr premium was auto-debited)

all.label: deceased had a bank account (PMJJBY is bank-linked)

benefit_components.title: ₹2,00,000 life cover claim — ask the bank if enrolled
benefit_components.title_hi: ₹2 लाख जीवन बीमा दावा — बैंक से पूछें
benefit_components.note: Many families never learn the deceased was enrolled (₹436/yr auto-debit). ALWAYS ask the bank to check. Claim early — insurers expect prompt filing (~30 days is safe).

benefit_components.title: ₹2,00,000 accident cover (PMSBY) — if death was accidental
benefit_components.note: ₹20/yr accident policy, also bank-linked. Needs FIR/post-mortem for accidental death. Ask the same bank.

schemes.name: EPF / EPS / ESIC survivor benefits
schemes.apply_at: Deceased's employer HR, or the regional EPFO/ESIC office

all.label: deceased worked in the formal sector (EPF/ESIC member)

benefit_components.title: EPF balance + EPS widow/child pension + EDLI insurance (up to ₹7 lakh)
benefit_components.title_hi: ईपीएफ राशि + विधवा/बाल पेंशन + ईडीएलआई बीमा
benefit_components.note: Three separate claims: PF balance (Form 20), monthly EPS pension for widow + children (Form 10-D), and EDLI life insurance up to ₹7 lakh (Form 5-IF). File through the employer.

schemes.name: BOCW construction-worker death benefit
schemes.authority: State Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board
schemes.apply_at: District labour office / BOCW board desk
schemes.grievance: State BOCW Welfare Board; district labour commissioner

all.label: deceased was a registered construction worker (BOCW card)

benefit_components.title: BOCW death benefit (₹1–5 lakh, varies by state; higher for accidents)
benefit_components.note: ₹43,000+ crore sits unspent in these boards. If the card lapsed, ask about condonation. Amount shown is a conservative floor — verify the state board's current rate.

schemes.name: Legal Heir / Succession Certificate
schemes.authority: Tehsildar / SDM office (heir certificate); civil court (succession)
schemes.apply_at: Tehsil / SDM office (many states also via e-district portal)

benefit_components.title: Get the legal heir certificate
benefit_components.note: Needed to transfer bank accounts, property, utilities and many claims. Cheap and local (tehsil); a court succession certificate is only for disputed/large estates.
